import{useMemo}from'react';import{CAB_TYPES}from'../data/mockData';const SURGE_MULTIPLIER=1.2;const GST_RATE=0.05;const FIXED_DISTANCE_KM=23.5;// mock distance for demo
export function useFare(cabId){let promoDiscount=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:0;return useMemo(()=>{const cab=CAB_TYPES.find(c=>c.id===cabId)||CAB_TYPES[0];const km=FIXED_DISTANCE_KM;const baseFare=cab.baseFare;const distFare=Math.round(km*cab.ratePerKm);const surge=Math.round(distFare*(SURGE_MULTIPLIER-1));const subtotal=baseFare+distFare+surge;const gst=Math.round(subtotal*GST_RATE);const gross=subtotal+gst;const discount=Math.min(promoDiscount,gross);const total=gross-discount;return{km,baseFare,distFare,surge,gst,gross,discount,total,surgeMultiplier:SURGE_MULTIPLIER};},[cabId,promoDiscount]);}export function formatCurrency(amount){return'₹'+amount.toLocaleString('en-IN');}
